zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley於1269年出生在英國爾布爾可勒時，他的父親Lord William Bulkeley29歲，母親Maud Davenport24歲。他於1301年與Felice Butler在英國英格蘭爾豪頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1262年在英國爾被列為sheriff of cheshire。他去世於1313年在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley于1269年出生在英国爾布爾可勒时，他的父亲Lord William Bulkeley29岁，母亲Maud Davenport24岁。他于1301年与Felice Butler在英国英格兰爾豪頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1262年在英国爾被列为sheriff of cheshire。他去世于1313年在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley was born in 1269, in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, his father, Lord William Bulkeley, was 29 and his mother, Maud Davenport, was 24. He married Felice Butler in 1301, in Haughton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1262, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cheshire in Cheshire, England. He died in 1313, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley est né en 1269, à Bulkeley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord William Bulkeley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maud Davenport, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Felice Butler en 1301, à Haughton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1262, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cheshire à Cheshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1313, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley 1269 in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord William Bulkeley 29 und seine Mutter Maud Davenport 24. Er hat 1301 in Haughton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Felice Butler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1262 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of cheshire in Cheshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1313 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley è nato il nel 1269 nel Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Lord William Bulkeley, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Maud Davenport, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Felice Butler nel 1301, nel Haughton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1262, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cheshire nel Cheshire, England. Morì nel 1313, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeleyが1269年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルケリーで生まれた時，父Lord William Bulkeleyは29歳，母Maud Davenportは24歳であった。1301年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハウトンでFelice Butlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1262年，イギリスチェシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of cheshireと記録されている。彼は1313年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley(이)가 1269년 영국 체실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord William Bulkeley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Davenport(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1301년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 하우그h턴에서 Felice Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1262년, 그의 직업은 영국 체실르에서 sheriff of cheshire이었다. 그는 1313년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley nasceu em 1269, em Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William Bulkeley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maud Davenport, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Felice Butler em 1301, em Haughton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1262, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cheshire em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1313, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley родился в 1269 г. в местности булкели, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord William Bulkeley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Davenport, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Felice Butler в 1301 г. в местности хотон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1262 году он работал по профессии sheriff of cheshire в местности чешир, Англия. Он умер в 1313 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Bulkeley - Lord of Bulkeley nació en 1269, en Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William Bulkeley, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Maud Davenport, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Felice Butler en 1301, en Haughton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1262, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cheshire en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1313, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
